projectDescription: A battle-tested collection of PowerShell scripts for enterprise IT administration covering Active Directory, Azure, Microsoft 365, Intune, VMware, and Windows Server automation.
keyFeatures: Active Directory user, group, and domain management automation
Microsoft 365 administration for Exchange, SharePoint, and Teams
Azure AD / Entra ID identity and Conditional Access management
Microsoft Intune device management with Proactive Remediations
VMware vSphere automation via PowerCLI with Entra ID federation
Windows Server administration including network trace capture
Dynamic PowerShell profile with module auto-management
publicApiSurface: netsh_multi_trace.ps1 - Captures three 60-minute netsh network traces with auto-compression
powercli_entra_id_connect_vcenter.ps1 - Connects to vCenter using Entra ID federated logins
Detect-WUPaths.ps1 / Remediate-WUPaths.ps1 - Windows Update registry path remediation
Detect-Zscaler.ps1 / Remediate-Zscaler.ps1 - Zscaler app detection and uninstall
Detect-Fastboot.ps1 / Remediate-Fastboot.ps1 - Windows Fast Boot disable remediation
Detect-Local_Admin_Account.ps1 / Remediate-Local_Admin_Account.ps1 - Local admin account management
Detect-Cisco-Umbrella.ps1 / Detect-Netskope.ps1 - Security agent compliance detection
install-zulu-jre.ps1 / uninstall-zulu-jre.ps1 - Azul Zulu OpenJRE Win32 app deployment
install-snagit-2024.ps1 / uninstall-snagit-2024.ps1 - SnagIT 2024 Win32 app deployment
Microsoft.PowerShell_profile.ps1 - Dynamic profile with Ensure-Module, custom prompt, and system info
dynamic_powershell_profile_loader.ps1 - Dynamic profile loader for module management
